'''''Pizzazz'' 12''' is the twelfth issue in the [[Marvel Comics]] popular culture monthly magazine. This issue was cover-dated [[September]] [[1978]] and featured the continuation of the serialized ''[[Star Wars]]'' comic ''[[The Kingdom of Ice]]''.<ref name="Issue 12" />

The issue also includes the article "The Villains," discussing science fiction movie heroes and featuring [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] and [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Grand Moff Tarkin]]. An ad and order form for the album ''[[The Story of Star Wars]]'' is included in the issue as well.<ref name="Issue 12" />
